name: bob-chat
description: BOB Chat — remote Telegram control via your phone over a cloud relay.

interface.shortDescription: Remote Telegram control via your phone
interface.longDescription: Control your Telegram through the BOB Chat phone app over a cloud relay — search contacts and messages, read unread, get recent history, send messages, and mark chats read. Runs entirely on your device; no chat data is stored server-side.
defaultPrompt: Find a contact and send them a message, or summarize my unread chats
